name: Notion — Query Database
description: Queries a Notion database using the official SDK

script.value:
import os, json
from notion_client import Client

token = os.environ.get('NOTION_TOKEN', '')
database_id = os.environ.get('DATABASE_ID', '')

notion = Client(auth=token)
results = notion.databases.query(database_id=database_id, page_size=10)

pages = []
for page in results.get('results', []):
    props = page.get('properties', {})
    title = ''
    for k, v in props.items():
        if v.get('type') == 'title':
            title = ''.join([t.get('plain_text', '') for t in v.get('title', [])])
            break
    pages.append({'id': page['id'], 'title': title, 'created': page.get('created_time', '')})

print(json.dumps({'database_id': database_id, 'count': len(pages), 'pages': pages}))
